title: Trial ended and it won't let me in to the individual platform
excerpt:
I tried support - they seem to be busy
I only have 1 user - ME as admin
It keeps saying I need to remove users?!
online help says it will automatically rollover to individual plan - and it’s not 
https://support.monday.…

posts.author: randeecpa (Randee R)
posts.cookedHtml:
1. I tried support - they seem to be busy
  2. I only have 1 user - ME as admin
  3. It keeps saying I need to remove users?!
  4. online help says it will automatically rollover to individual plan - and it’s not
    https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010594079-What-plan-is-my-trial-on-and-how-long-is-it-for-F-

What happens once my trial expires?

Once your trial expires, you have two options:

  • You can upgrade to a paid account: Standard, Pro or Enterprise. To learn how to upgrade your account, check out this article.
  • If you choose to not upgrade to a paid plan, your account will automatically be moved to the free plan.

I really need to get into my data - has this happened to anyone??

Thanks.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @randeecpa - Did you get help yet from monday․com? I think your account was part of a test for the new Individual plan and perhaps there is a bug in the transition from Trial. If you still need help, send me an email at deb@polishedgeek.com and I’ll see if I can help.

~ Deb

posts.author: randeecpa (Randee R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you I did finally hear from them - not to my satisfaction, however.

Thanks for taking the time to respond.
